Title: Verify initial configuration check and distributor list access
Preconditions:
- Application is freshly installed (no prior configuration).
- User has not completed initial setup.
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. System prompts: *"La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata?"*
3. User selects **"No"** (initial config not done).
4. System redirects to **"Aggiungi veicolo"** (vehicle addition).
Expected Result:
- Application skips distributor list access and proceeds to vehicle addition.
- No error messages appear.

Title: Verify initial configuration check and distributor list access (positive)
Preconditions: - Initial configuration is completed (e.g., user profile set up).
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application.
2. System prompts: *"La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata?"*
3. User selects **"Si"** (config done).
4. System redirects to **"Accesso lista distributori"**.
Expected Result:
- Distributor list loads successfully.
- Navigation bar appears with options (e.g., "Impostazioni").

Title: Add vehicle manually (no dataset selection)
Preconditions: - Initial config not done (or user skips distributor list).
Test Data: - Vehicle details: *Targa: AB123CD, Marca: Fiat, Modello: Panda*.
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Aggiungi veicolo"**.
2. System prompts: *"Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset?"*
3. User selects **"No"** (manual entry).
4. System opens manual entry form.
5. User inputs vehicle details and submits.
6. System prompts: *"Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo?"*
7. User selects **"No"**.
Expected Result:
- Vehicle is saved to the system.
- User returns to initial state (e.g., distributor list or settings).

Title: Search and add vehicle from dataset (success)
Preconditions: - Dataset contains at least one vehicle (e.g., *Targa: XY987ZY*).
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Aggiungi veicolo"**.
2. System prompts: *"Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset?"*
3. User selects **"Si"**.
4. System opens search interface.
5. User enters search query and submits.
6. System returns results: *"Hai trovato il veicolo nel dataset?"* → **"Si"**.
7. User selects the vehicle and confirms addition.
8. System prompts: *"Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo?"*
9. User selects **"No"**.
Expected Result:
- Vehicle is added to the system.
- No duplicate entries appear.

Title: Search vehicle in dataset (not found)
Preconditions: - Dataset contains no matching vehicle for the query.
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Aggiungi veicolo"**.
2. System prompts: *"Vuoi selezionare il tuo veicolo dal dataset?"*
3. User selects **"Si"**.
4. System opens search interface.
5. User enters invalid query and submits.
6. System returns: *"Hai trovato il veicolo nel dataset?"* → **"No"**.
7. User attempts to proceed without adding.
Expected Result:
- System prevents vehicle addition without a valid match.
- User is prompted to either:
  - Retry search, or
  - Manually add a vehicle.

Title: Add multiple vehicles sequentially
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Aggiungi veicolo"**.
2. User manually adds Vehicle 1 → confirms addition.
3. System prompts: *"Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo?"* → **"Si"**.
4. User searches for and adds Vehicle 2 from dataset.
5. System prompts again: *"Vuoi aggiungere un altro veicolo?"* → **"No"**.
Expected Result:
- Both vehicles are saved.
- No conflicts or duplicates occur.

Title: Access and display distributor list (default)
Preconditions:
- Initial config is done.
- User is on the distributor list page.
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Accesso lista distributori"**.
2. System prompts: *"Vuoi modificare i parametri di ordinamento della lista di distributori?"*
3. User selects **"No"**.
4. System displays default distributor list.
Expected Result:
- List loads with default sorting (e.g., alphabetical by name).
- All distributors are visible.

Title: Customize and apply sorting parameters
Preconditions: - User is on the distributor list page.
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Accesso lista distributori"**.
2. System prompts: *"Vuoi modificare i parametri di ordinamento?"* → **"Si"**.
3. User selects sorting parameters and applies.
4. System displays updated list.
Expected Result:
- List re-sorts according to selected criteria.
- Confirmation message appears (e.g., *"Parametri aggiornati"*).

Title: Select distributor and trigger navigation
Preconditions: - Distributor list is displayed with at least one entry.
Test Data: - Distributor: *Nome: Distributore Alfa, Indirizzo: Via Roma 1*.
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Seleziona il distributore"** → picks *Distributore Alfa*.
2. System opens navigation app automatically.
3. User completes navigation (simulated).
4. System confirms: *"Navigazione terminata, raggiunto distributore"*.
Expected Result:
- Navigation app launches with correct coordinates.
- System detects arrival and displays confirmation.

Title: Cancel distributor selection (edge case)
Test Steps:
1. User selects **"Seleziona il distributore"** but closes the selection modal without choosing.
2. System returns to distributor list.
Expected Result:
- No navigation app opens.
- User remains on the distributor list.

Title: Access settings and view current settings
Preconditions: - User is on the distributor list or any other page.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to **"Accesso pagina impostazioni"**.
2. System displays: *"Visualizza le impostazioni"*.
3. User does not interact further.
Expected Result:
- Settings page loads with current values (e.g., vehicle list, app preferences).
- No errors occur.

Title: Navigate from settings to distributor list
Preconditions: - User is on the settings page.
Test Steps:
1. User selects *"Vuoi cambiare schermata?"* → **"Si"**.
2. System prompts: *"Click sull'accesso pagina lista distributori"* → **"Si"**.
3. User is redirected to distributor list.
Expected Result:
- Distributor list loads without data loss.
- Navigation bar updates to reflect current page.

Title: Modify vehicle list in settings
Preconditions: - User has at least one vehicle added.
Test Steps:
1. User selects *"Vuoi modificare i tuoi veicoli?"* → **"Si"**.
2. User removes *AB123CD* from the list.
3. System displays: *"Visualizza pop-up 'modifica effettuata'"*.
Expected Result:
- Vehicle is removed from the system.
- Pop-up confirms successful modification.
- Vehicle list updates across all pages.

Title: Cancel vehicle modification (edge case)
Preconditions: - User is on the settings page.
Test Steps:
1. User selects *"Vuoi modificare i tuoi veicoli?"* → **"Si"**.
2. User opens modification interface but cancels without saving.
3. System returns to settings page.
Expected Result:
- No changes are applied to the vehicle list.
- System shows original vehicle list.

Title: End-to-end flow: Add vehicle → Access distributor list → Navigate to distributor
Test Steps:
1. Launch app → initial config is done → access distributor list.
2. Add a vehicle manually (e.g., *Targa: TEST456*).
3. Return to distributor list.
4. Select a distributor and trigger navigation.
5. Simulate arrival.
Expected Result:
- Vehicle is added successfully.
- Distributor list loads without errors.
- Navigation completes and confirms arrival.

Title: Handle missing initial configuration (negative)
Preconditions: - Application crashes during initial config check.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate a crash when prompted: *"La configurazione iniziale è stata effettuata?"*.
2. User restarts the app.
Expected Result:
- System detects prior state and prompts for initial config again.
- No data corruption occurs.

Title: Invalid vehicle data entry (negative)
Preconditions: - User is adding a vehicle manually.
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to add a vehicle with invalid targa.
2. System validates input.
Expected Result:
- System rejects the input with an error message (e.g., *"Formato targa non valido"*).
- User is prompted to re-enter valid data.
